description: Bug description with reproduction steps — produce a structured bug report issue
input: Write a GitHub issue for this bug: When a user logs in with an expired token, the app crashes with a nil pointer instead of showing an error message. It happens every time on the /profile page.

description: Feature request — produce an issue with purpose and acceptance criteria
input: We want to add a dark mode toggle to the settings page. Users have been asking for it. Can you write a GitHub issue for this?

description: Vague problem statement — should ask for more info or flag gaps, not invent details
input: Something is broken in the checkout flow. Can you write an issue?
